name: My insurer wants a statement before I file illness claim in Boise—should I?

mainEntity.name: My insurer wants a statement before I file illness claim in Boise—should I?

acceptedAnswer.description: No, consult lawyer first; recorded statements can harm claims.[2] Insurers seek contradictions.[2] Key factors: (1) potential misquotes; (2) pre-lawyer risks; (3) rights waiver. Write everything down yourself. Decline politely. Protects your position.
